description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs named test:nightly and test:stable, both running in the default test stage. Use the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image for test:nightly and rust:latest for test:stable. In test:nightly add a before_script that sets RUSTFLAGS="--cfg procmacro2_semver_exempt" and runs cargo install cargo-tarpaulin, then script commands: rustc --version && cargo --version, cargo test --all --verbose, and cargo tarpaulin --out Stdout, and configure a coverage regex /(d+\.\)d+\%) coverage/. In test:stable enable a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG and run the same script commands rustc --version && cargo --version and cargo test --all --verbose. No explicit rules, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
